description_long: This is a decorative bracelet composed of alternating spherical beads and curved metallic segments. The central section features six large, textured beads, with three deep red and three gold-toned beads arranged in an alternating pattern. The red beads are covered in a faceted, gem-like surface, while the gold beads have a spotted, almost animal-print appearance. Flanking the central beads are smooth, white spherical beads, which transition into two intricately patterned, metallic curved segments. The bracelet is completed with a simple clasp mechanism, visible at the ends, allowing it to be fastened around the wrist. The overall design is bold and ornate, with a strong contrast between the metallic, white, and richly colored beads.
description: An ornate bracelet featuring alternating red and gold textured beads, smooth white beads, and patterned metallic segments, finished with a clasp. The design is bold and highly decorative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full arrangement of red and gold beads at the center, flanked by white beads and metallic segments, with the clasp barely visible at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curvature of the metallic segments and the spherical shape of the white beads, with the clasp and bead textures partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the clasp mechanism prominently, with the white beads and metallic segments forming the main visible structure, and the colored beads less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the arrangement of the colored beads and the metallic segments, with the clasp and some white beads visible at the edge.
